title: Timber Enchantment
description: New enchantment for axes to mine connected logs!
body:
# Timber Enchantment

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/timber-enchantment?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/timber-enchantment)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

<hr>

## 📖 Description

New enchantment for axes to mine multiple matching connected logs! (only vanilla axes and vanilla logs)

Compatible with [Magnetic Enchantment](https://modrinth.com/datapack/magnetic-enchantment)!

The enchantment can be obtained from the enchantment table, loot chests or trading with villagers.

---

## ⚠️ Incompatibilities

Not compatible with:
- [Configurable Despawn Timer](https://modrinth.com/mod/configurable-despawn-timer)
- [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad)

---

## ⌨️ Commands

Give:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot timber_enchantment:timber
```

Enchant:

```mcfunction
/enchant @s timber_enchantment:timber
```

<hr>
